summary: Made two surgical seam edits: clarified that Owen is finally bringing the hidden manuscript into the Room of Requirement after sitting on it for nearly two days, and tightened the closing beat toward the private no-audience testing that opens chapter 4.
edits: Adjusted the entry to foreground Owen's delayed choice to bring the Grinlow Leaves into the Room of Requirement.
Adjusted the exit to point toward solitary follow-up with the manuscript, aligning with chapter 4's private hand-testing.
